decision.reasoning_trace: Based on the provided product feed, a consideration set of 5 products was selected for the customer looking to buy running shoes. The final choice, 'prod_running_shoes_103' (Brooks Men's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe), was selected due to its high rating (4.7), large number of reviews (14830), and positive review comments indicating comfort and suitability for running. The other products in the consideration set were chosen for their high ratings, comfortable features, and positive reviews. 'prod_running_shoes_147' (STQ Women's Running Shoes) and 'prod_running_shoes_162' (adidas Men's Racer Tr21 Running Shoe) offers breathable and cushioned features. 'prod_running_shoes_094' (ASICS Men's Gel-Contend 6 Running Shoes) provides excellent support and comfort for running. 'prod_running_shoes_114' (ASICS Women's Gel-Nimbus 18 Running Shoe) has a well-cushioned sole and a comfortable fit.
